title: pinus cooperi var. ornelasii
intro: Pinus cooperi var. ornelasii, also known as Ornelas' Apache Pine, is a variant of the Pinus cooperi tree, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high levels of terpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Pinus cooperi var. ornelasii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
